confirmation: General-feedback log entry recorded. Invoke logFeedback() with the payload below to persist to Supabase.

record.title: Appreciation: New Tab page
record.summary: User expressed gratitude; no issue described.

usage: import { logFeedback, NEW_TAB_THANK_YOU_FEEDBACK } from '@/lib/feedback-logger'; const res = await logFeedback(NEW_TAB_THANK_YOU_FEEDBACK); if (res.success) { /* res.analytics_item is ready for analytics backend */ }
notes: Use logFeedback() from @/api/feedback or @/lib/feedback-logger. Pass NEW_TAB_THANK_YOU_FEEDBACK for the New Tab 'Thank you.' case. Response.analytics_item is the ready-to-ingest format for the analytics backend. user_id/session_id are attached when available.
